RT @dancow: @mrejfox @albertocairo Curated and filtered facts, arranged  to form a memorable and purposeful narrative
@albertocairo @dancow Which brings me back to my original question- which is what is our shared definition of story

@dancow @albertocairo Yeah I feel like on all scales- aggregation of data points is in itself storytelling, and each individual days point is either a piece of a story or a complete story in itself. Stories are often both the input and output of data analysis and viz.
RT @dancow: @mrejfox @albertocairo Similarly, data vis is just as objective — and deliberately framed and contextualized — as any work of p…
RT @dancow: @mrejfox @albertocairo I would go even further and say that every visualization is literally as limited and opinionated as a st…

@albertocairo @dancow I bet I could find the storytelling in any example of insightful or explanatory visualization. 

Semantics are important too. How do you define "story" and "storytelling"?
